description_long: This is a large, L-shaped office building with a flat roof and a modern, utilitarian design. The exterior features a two-tone color scheme, with the lower portion clad in reddish-brown brick and the upper stories finished in a light gray material. Rows of evenly spaced rectangular windows line each visible facade, providing a rhythmic and orderly appearance. The roof is mostly bare except for a few HVAC units and utility structures, and the main entrance is marked by a small overhang and glass doors. One side of the building displays a company logo, indicating commercial occupancy. The overall structure is solid and functional, typical of mid-to-late 20th-century office architecture.
description: A large, L-shaped modern office building with a flat roof, brick and gray exterior, and rows of rectangular windows. Features a main glass entrance and visible rooftop utilities.
description_view_0: Side view showing the L-shaped layout, with two facades of windows and a mostly bare flat roof.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the main glass entrance and symmetrical window arrangement.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with visible company signage and uninterrupted rows of windows.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the building's corner and windowless brick wall section.
attribute_window_pattern: Regularly spaced, vertically aligned rectangular windows in continuous horizontal rows on each floor.
